use_cases: Form submission triggers with customizable variants
Navigation action buttons with outline or link styles
Primary call-to-action buttons with hover feedback
Icon-only buttons for compact UI actions
ai_summary: A reusable React button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Styled with Tailwind CSS for ring-based focus states and disabled opacity handling. Exportable as standalone Button component with forwardRef support.
